issue: parse_line() parses a CSV record into fields and supports fields wrapped in double quotes. Inside a quoted field a doubled quote (two double-quote characters in a row, "") is meant to be an escape for a single literal double-quote character, so the record "a""b" should parse to the single field a"b. Instead the escaped quote disappears entirely: the parser treats the first quote as the end of the quoted region and the second as the start of a new one, so "a""b" comes out as ab. Records without doubled quotes are parsed correctly. Fix the quoted-field handling so a doubled quote decodes to one literal quote character.
